user_query: I'm putting together my expense report. What are the most expensive restaurants I've booked?

node_data.name: Alo Restaurant
node_data.description: Three Michelin-starred French tasting menu. Extremely expensive and exclusive fine dining. Intimate 8-course experience with wine pairings. Very formal and upscale.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Alo Restaurant is explicitly extremely expensive with expected_cost CAD 300-400 (highest range among candidates) and described as three-Michelin-star fine dining.

node_data.name: Kaiseki Kaji
node_data.description: Exquisite Japanese kaiseki dining experience. Very expensive omakase with seasonal courses. Intimate and formal setting.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Kaiseki Kaji is described as a very expensive omakase with expected_cost CAD 250-350 (second-highest range) and clearly a high-cost restaurant booking.

node_data.name: Canoe Restaurant
node_data.description: Upscale Canadian cuisine on the 54th floor of TD Tower. Expensive fine dining with panoramic city views. Elegant and formal atmosphere.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Canoe Restaurant is upscale fine dining with expected_cost CAD 150-200, making it among the more expensive bookings compared with the remaining candidates.
